basic_details.job_title: AWBI Stenographer Grade I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Animal Welfare Board of India (AWBI) Stenographer Grade I Notification 2026 has been released on 31 March 2026 on the official website www.awbi.gov.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AWBI Stenographer Grade I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree from a recognised University or equivalent
qualification.details: Degree from a recognised University or equivalent. Skill test: dictation for ten minutes at the speed of 100 words per minute, with transcription time of 40 minutes in English or 55 minutes in Hindi on computer.

salary_details.details: Level-5 (₹29,200–92,300) of the Pay Matrix VII CPC. The salary ranges from Rs. ₹29,200 to ₹92,300 per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AWBI Stenographer Grade I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.awbi.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AWBI Stenographer Grade-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the AWBI Stenographer Grade-I (Group ‘C’) post is 29th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Stenographer Grade-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree from a recognized University or equivalent. Additionally, a skill test is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Stenographer Grade-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Stenographer Grade-I post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Stenographer Grade-I post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Stenographer Grade-I post is as per Level-5 of the Pay Matrix, ranging from ₹29,200 to ₹92,300.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the AWBI Stenographer Grade-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Stenographer Grade-I post?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Skill Test to assess dictation and transcription abilities.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the AWBI located?
faq.answer: The AWBI is located at 42 Milestone, Delhi-Agra Highway, NH-2, Sikri, Ballabhgarh, Haryana.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Stenographer Grade-I post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Stenographer Grade-I (Group ‘C’) post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Animal Welfare Board of India, which is www.awbi.gov.in.
